Test Title/Summary of test cases: Verify the Mapped with MUSINSA products Text
Pre-conditions:
MD is on the Product List page.
The product list has at least 1 product that is mapped with Musinsa product.
Test Steps:
1. Open Product list screen
2. Focus on the product that is mapped with Musinsa Products
Expected Result:
Display 'Mapped with MUSINSA products'.
 
Display Rules:
 - The font is bold.

Test Title/Summary of test cases: Verify the Platform Icon + Text
Pre-conditions:
MD is on the Product List page.
The product list has at least 1 product that is mapped with Musinsa product.
Test Steps:
1. Open Product list screen
2. Focus on the product that is mapped with Musinsa Products
Expected Result:
Display the Product ID of mapped Musinsa’s products
 
Display Rules:
- The ID of all mapped products will be displayed in CPI, sorted by DESC order.
- The ID of mapped product will be shown in hyperlink, containing the URL to the designated internal product detail page on RADAR.
-  If the list of mapped products is longer than the “Mapped with MUSINSA product” container’s height, the list will be scrollable.
Database field: id of Internal Product

Test Title/Summary of test cases: Verify the CPI ID
Pre-conditions:
MD is on the Product List page.
The product list has at least 1 product that is mapped with Musinsa product.
Test Steps:
1. Open Product list screen
2. Focus on the product that is mapped with Musinsa Products
Expected Result:
Show the 'Competitive Price Index' of the mapped product from an external platform for MD to know the ratio of that product's price compared to Musinsa’s product price.
 
 Display Rules:
 - Formula: CPI = ([Price of the mapped product] / [Price of the Musinsa's product]) * 100 (Does not count Musinsa’s product).
 
 - Example calculations:
  - [MUSINSA] || CPI: 120 || 21,000원
  - [MUSINSA] || CPI: 100 || 25,200원
  - [MUSINSA] || CPI: 98 || 25,714원
  - A-bly - MUSINSA product a: CPI = (25,200 / 21,000) * 100 = 120
  - A-bly - MUSINSA product b: CPI = (25,200 / 25,200) * 100 = 100
  - A-bly - MUSINSA product c: CPI = (25,200 / 25,714) * 100 = 98
 
 - CPI will be shown in different colors based on its value:
  - If CPI > 100, the CPI value will be shown in Green color.
  - If CPI = 100, the CPI value will be shown in Yellow color.
  - If CPI < 100, the CPI value will be shown in Red color.
 
 - CPI will always be rounded to 0 decimal places using the math.round() function (If >= 0.5 rounded up, if < 0.5 rounded down).
